titleStmt.title: SII 31.112: original edition by C. A. Padmanabha Sastri and T. S. Ravishankar
No. 112. (A.R. No. B 257 of 1938.) PANDIḶḶAPALLE, KAMALAPURAM TALUK, CUDDAPAH DISTRICT.

summary.p: Salb set up in front of the Venkaṭēśvarasvāmi temple.
It is dated in Śaka 1476, Ānanda, Phālguṇa śu. 15, corresponding to March 8, Friday, 1555 A.D. (current).

Damaged and registers the gift of lands made by Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Kōnaya Dēva mahārāja, son of Gobbūri Timmarāyajadēva mahārāja to several Brahmins and to the temples of Perumāḷu. Vināyaka, Channarāya, Mailaradēva, Aṁkhāladēvi at Pandiḷḷapalli, and also to the artisans who participated in the construction of these temples. The village Paṁdiḷḷapalli is stated to have been given as amaram to the donor by Nandēla Timmarāja, situated in the Ganṭikōṭa. It also refers to the grant of the taxes like perusuṅkam grāmakaṭnam for maintaining the dīpārādhana.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . svasti . śrījayābhyudaya śālivāhana
śakavaruṣaṁbulu 1476 Agunēṭi Anaṁ
da saṁvatsara phālguṇa śu 15 lu śrīma
hārāja rājaparamēsva(śva)ra śrīvīrapratāpa śrīsadā
sivadēva mahārāyalu vidyānagaramaṁdu vajrasiṁhā
ḍhuḍai pṛdhivi sāṁrājyaṁ śēyucuṁnagā śrīmaṁnma
ḍalaiśvara gōbūri tiṁmarājaya dēvamahārājulugāri
koḍku kōnayadēva mahārājulugāru paṁdiḷla dēvabra
ku yicina bhūdāna dha¨rmaśāsanaṁ . sadāsivadēva mahārāyalu
timarājayavāri nāyaṁkarānaku pāliṁcina gaṁṭikōṭa
lōnu māku Amarānaku naṁdela tiṁmmarāju Ayyavā
ṁcina paṁdaḷlapalli grāmāna cellēdēvabrāṁhaṇamānya
yaṁ cēnu perumāḷamānyekha . nu vinayakhuni māneṁ kha [.] nu
ḍipāṭi ceṁnarāyani tōṭalōni yisvaruni māne kha 1 nu vīrabhadru
mānye mailārudēvaraku 3 nu Āṁkhaladēvi mane Ö 2 nnu
nuni Āragiṁpulaku Ö 4 nnu yaṁkhalidēvi mānye Ö 2 su Aṁttu
mānyeṁ kha 2 . 1 nu kaṁdāḷappagāri rāmāṁja
kha2ni pa suva Ināriyaku kha 1 . su neladalū
kayaku khasaṁnnu sama[ti¨rdhaṁ] seṭipalli kṛṣṇa
ku kha . 0 nnu yallavāṭalu puruṣōtmuniki kha . 0 nnuma
bhaṭlaku kha . 1 nnu vaṁḍraṁgi bhaṭlaku Ö 2 nnu sōmavaju
snu yallaṁ bhaṭlaku Ö 1 nnu surabhi tiṁmmayaku la 74 nu
mari balabhadraya Ö 2 nnu Ānaṁtarāju veṁgaya kha Û 0
rājuliṁgama līnu māḍupuri tiṁmmayya 2 nnu
tarāja padmaya li 13 rācirāju pedrāmala kha yya goppa 13 Āya
mānye kha 4�3 viresvaruni dēvastānaṁ kaṭini tippibattuvi dhiki . mara
kaṭina śivabatuniki Þ 7 nu Āṁtu kha � Û 1 Û goburi
magāriki puṁṇyaṁgānu Idha¨rmānaku ya
tapina vāru Arata gōbraṁhani vadhiIṁcina pāpaṁnumari tamatalli taṁḍṟla
nu vāraṇāśilō caṁpina na pōvāru pēṁṭa suṁkaṁ grāmakaṭnaṁmu
nu dīpārādhanaku yicināraṁ .
Digital edition of SII 31.112 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
